c.d: Maximum number of contacts that can be added to a single broadcast list or group messaging feature
c.s: App documentation, user manuals, feature specifications

c.d: Success rate of message delivery to all intended recipients in broadcast scenarios
c.s: User reviews, app store ratings, technical documentation

c.d: Number of different platforms and devices the app supports for seamless cross-platform broadcasting
c.s: Official app stores, developer websites, compatibility lists

c.d: Variety and sophistication of broadcasting features including scheduling, media support, list management, and analytics
c.s: App feature lists, user guides, in-app functionality assessment

c.d: Total number of active users globally, indicating the likelihood that contacts will have the app installed
c.s: Company reports, market research, app store statistics
